summary: Step 2 frontend testing PASSED end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844). Verified Matches chat list, dedicated Chat screen (tab bar hidden), header detail pills (Gender/Age/€Budget), welcome bubble, sending outgoing messages, back navigation, bottom-tab navigation across all 4 tabs, circle active indicator (48x48 borderRadius=999px), smooth swipe deck with like/nope buttons, and empty matches state. No regressions, no red screens, no console errors (only React-Native deprecation warnings for shadow* / pointerEvents which are upstream RN web warnings, non-blocking).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings on web: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' — appearing from styles using shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset and from <View pointerEvents="box-none"> in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/roommates.tsx (actions row) plus shadows in /app/frontend/src/components/SwipeDeck.tsx and GlassTabBar styling. Non-blocking on native; cosmetic on web. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/roommates.tsx:88, /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/roommates.tsx:130-134 (filterPill shadow), /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/roommates.tsx:153-158 (actionBtn shadow).

action_items: (Optional polish) Migrate shadow* StyleSheet props to RN's new `boxShadow` and move `pointerEvents` from prop to `style.pointerEvents` to silence RN web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: matches store uses module-level mutable state (acceptable for in-memory step-2 scope, but won't survive a reload — fine per problem statement).

ChatScreen relies on matches store to look up profile; deep-linking /chat/<id> directly without prior like will render the 'Conversation not found' fallback. Acceptable since app entry is via Matches tab.
SwipeDeck uses contentFit=cover with recyclingKey and transition=0 — good for smoothness; deck does not unmount/reload between swipes (top + next layer pattern).
seed_data_creation: None — used in-app like-button to seed matches at runtime.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 2 verified: Matches tab (matches-screen, matches-empty, chat-row-<id>), Chat route /chat/[id] (chat-screen, chat-back-button, chat-input, chat-send-button, chat-message-<id>, chat-message-welcome) — bottom-tab-bar correctly hidden on chat. Circle tab indicator confirmed (48x48, borderRadius 999px). SwipeDeck advances smoothly. Visit /matches with a fresh page to see empty state; tap like-button on roommates first to populate matches.
